title: Rooty

{{Quote|Come on, Rooty! You're a reasonable guy! Let's ''negotiate!|Lando Calrissian|<ref name="UYV" />}}
'''Rooty''' was a [[Cragmoloid/Legends|Cragmoloid]] [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]] that frequented the [[Casino/Legends|casinos]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. He was also a moderately successful [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], traveling onboard the [[VR-10 Cuirilla-Rayl Xylines-class spacetug|CRX-Tug]] ''[[Solar Grazer]]''. Rooty's love of drinking and gambling always kept him almost one [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] away from bankruptcy, even if he once earned a fortune defeating [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] at [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]]. However, the Cragmoloid tended to spend his [[Currency/Legends|money]] hedonistically, trying to leave behind the disgrace of having abandoned his people in their moment of need.

==Biography==
{{Quote|I don't need another ship. I want ''credits!|Rooty|<ref name="UYV" />}}
Rooty was a [[Cragmoloid/Legends|Cragmoloid]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] born in the Cragmoloid [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], Ankus. During his lifetime, Cragmoloids in Ankus were harassed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], [[Tagge Company/Legends|TaggeCo]] and hunters, with the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] approaching extinction. Only a few Cragmoloids, including Rooty, managed to escape Ankus to the relative safety of other [[Planet/Legends|planets]]. Like them, Rooty sawed off his natural tusks to avoid greedy hunters.<ref name="G6" />

In [[11 BBY/Legends|11 BBY]], Rooty reached [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], where he settled. Rooty, an avid client to [[Casino/Legends|casinos]], became a successful [[Gambling/Legends|gambler]] and sporadic [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] — particularly from the point he obtained his own [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the [[VR-10 Cuirilla-Rayl Xylines-class spacetug|CRX-Tug]] ''[[Solar Grazer]]''. Rooty spent most of his time on Nar Shaddaa, mingling with [[Scoundrel/Legends|scoundrels]] such as [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Salla Zend]]. He seldom [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] his ship for a short smuggling run on [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]].<ref name="G6" />

In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], Rooty played [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] with Calrissian and several others. Confident in his hand, Calrissian raised his bet to some 20,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]],<ref name="G6" /> even if he did not have so much money at the time. Rooty defeated Calrissian with an [[Idiot's Array/Legends|Idiot's Array]] and then was aghast when Calrissian offered alternative payments. Suddenly enraged at Calrissian, Rooty threatened the [[Socorran]] with physical violence, including [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] fire. Joined by the other gamblers, Rooty chased Calrissian through the casino, eventually catching him in a cul-de-sac stair. Rooty snarled death threats to Calrissian, but he was suddenly placated by [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]] who, having need of Calrissian's services, offered to clear his debt to Rooty. The Cragmoloid accepted the money,<ref name="UYV" /> but he still felt antipathy towards Calrissian from that point on.<ref name="G6" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Hey, it was a great game. You're the best sabacc player I've ever faced. Really.|Lando Calrissian|<ref name="UYV" />}}
Like many Cragmoloids, Rooty was a huge [[pachydermoid]] with a big trunk, flap-like ears and natural tusks, although Rooty in particular had sawed off his. Quiet, strong, burly, and ill-mannered, he tended to ram brutally whenever someone angered him. He tended to lose his temper whenever faced with trickery. Rooty was ill-mannered and hid his own age. He also used to gamble and drink, looking for temporary pleasure and spending all of his money, in a vain attempt to forget the shame of turning his back to the plights of his species.<ref name="G6" />

Rooty, who spoke both [[Cragii]] and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]], was a good gambler and had some skill as a pilot and smuggler. He piloted the CRX-Tug ''[[Solar Grazer]]'', which had been customized with a short-range [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] to perform smuggling runs. However, Rooty neglected the maintenance of his ship, leading to it almost falling to pieces.<ref name="G6" />

==Behind the scenes==
Rooty first appeared in the [[Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika 1|first issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika|''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'']] series of comics, written by [[Mike Kennedy]] and drawn by [[Carlos Meglia]]. His background was expanded in the [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] article ''[[Unusual Suspects]]'', published in [[Star Wars Gamer 6|''Star Wars Gamer'' 6]], and adapting Rooty to be used in [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]. Rooty's name was mentioned among the list of Cragmoloid names in ''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''.
